input_natural_language: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to NOMINAL when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
explanation: The LTL property specifies that the autopilot will only transition from the TRANSITION state to the NOMINAL state when both the system is supported (indicated by the boolean 'supported') and the sensor data is good (indicated by the boolean 'good'). This captures the provided natural language by ensuring the conditions are met before the transition occurs.
decision3: at the next timepoint satisfy bool_exp3
decision3_substring: at the next timepoint satisfy bool_exp3
output_structured_natural_language: whenever state_is_TRANSITION, at the next timepoint satisfy state_is_NOMINAL
